'''Watchman''' was one of the four members of [[Unit Aurek-Seven]] of the [[501st Legion (Empire of the Hand)|501st Legion]] in the [[Empire of the Hand]]. The unit consisted of [[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]], [[Cloud (stormtrooper)|Cloud]], [[Shadow (stormtrooper)|Shadow]] and Watchman. Watchman was the [[tech specialist]] of the unit and thus was equipped with more advanced sensors.

==Biography==
====Overthrowing a Warlord====
He aided the [[Eickarie]]s in the [[Capture of the Warlord|liberation of Kariek]] from [[the Warlord]], who had taken over the planet and subjugated the natives. Watchman accompanied Twister and a force of Eickarie led by [[Su-mil]], whose goal was to free prisoners of the Warlord. They were responsible for the taking of the Warlord's [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] and his capture.

====The rediscovery of Outbound Flight====
Later, in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], he [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|accompanied]] [[Chak Fel]] aboard the [[Chaf Envoy]] to [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]] along with the rest of Unit Aurek-Seven as a guard detail for the [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. Watchman also participated in the [[Battle of the Redoubt]], helping [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] Skywalker in securing the remains of [[Outbound Flight]] against the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]]. Following the battle, Commander Fel led the unit to join [[Prard'ras'kleoni|General Drask]]'s [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] task force to Vagaari space.
